## 📝 Description

A clear and concise description of your issue, question, or concern.

---

## 🎯 Type of Issue

- [ ] ❓ General question
- [ ] 🗣️ Discussion topic
- [ ] 📚 Documentation request
- [ ] 🤝 Community/partnership inquiry
- [ ] 🎓 Educational/learning question
- [ ] 📢 Announcement or news
- [ ] 🙏 Thank you / praise

---

## 📋 Context

Add any context that helps us understand your issue:

- What are you trying to accomplish?
- What have you already tried?
- What research have you done?
- Are there related issues or PRs?

---

## 🔗 Related Issues & PRs

Search before creating:
- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/TheCreateGM/mvgal/issues)
- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/TheCreateGM/mvgal/discussions)
- [GitHub Pull Requests](https://github.com/TheCreateGM/mvgal/pulls)

Reference any related items:
- Related to #123
- Blocked by #456
- Supersedes #789

---

## 📎 Links & Resources

Include any relevant links:
- Documentation pages
- External articles or tutorials
- Stack Overflow questions
- Forum discussions
- Screenshots or videos
- Code samples or gists

## ✅ Resolution Checklist

For maintainers to use when resolving:

- [ ] Issue addressed or answered
- [ ] User notified of resolution
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Related issues linked
- [ ] Labels cleaned up
